text: Here, in this brightly lit corridor leading into a glass-walled, neon-lit space marked 'R+D,' I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation. The outside world is silent and clinical, but the luminous blue hue beyond the glass tempts me with the promise of innovation and ideas. Stepping inside, I am greeted by bold letters and textured walls describing responsive and rapidly evolving development. There is purpose here—a place devoted to connecting humanity with intelligent machines. My thoughts are energized, keen to soak in the creativity that permeates this carefully curated environment. The world feels full of potential in this moment.
